home.title: Mauricio Peón - Engineer, entrepreneur and runner.
home.description: I'm Mauricio Peón, a computer science engineer and CTO at Medu.
home.intro: I'm Mauricio Peón, a computer science engineer, CTO at Medu, and a lover of the most beautiful sport in the world (football). In the mornings, I run a little; at night, I read.

newsletter.title: What's new
newsletter.description: New ideas will gradually be added to this portfolio.

projects.title: Projects - Mauricio Peón
projects.metaDescription: Some projects I've had the opportunity to collaborate on.
projects.heading: Some projects I've had the opportunity to collaborate on.
projects.intro: In this section, I invite you to explore a carefully curated collection of my most significant projects. Each one reflects my passion, dedication, and growth as a professional.

descriptions.medu: We are a Spanish-language medical education platform specialized in audiovisual Health Sciences content.
descriptions.teTocoApp: Caught between options? Not sure what to eat, where to go, or which movie to watch? Let ¿Te tocó? make the decision for you. ¿Te tocó? is the most fun and elegant way to make random decisions. With interactive 3D dice and smooth animations, it turns indecision into a fun moment.
descriptions.meduApp: Mobile medical education app in Spanish specialized in audiovisual Health Sciences content.
descriptions.ppaa: PPAA is driven by an architecture of ideas over forms.
descriptions.a911: a|911 is a multidisciplinary firm covering architecture, urbanism, mobility, and landscape projects.
descriptions.domingo: Online store for soft, 100% cotton bedsheets based in Mexico City.
descriptions.xolo: This project offers a unique accommodation experience in Mexico City.
descriptions.zamme: Zamme is a visual communication platform aiming to build community through knowledge sharing and collaborations.
descriptions.macondo: This project is a carefully curated compendium of over 200 plant varieties and essential gardening accessories.
descriptions.camsam: This innovative tool is designed to simplify and streamline tariff calculations for architects in Mexico City.
descriptions.presidentes: A satirical page about the achievements of Mexico's presidents.

inspirations.title: Inspirations
inspirations.heading: Inspirations Gallery
inspirations.intro: Welcome to the Inspirations Gallery, a unique space where I share the works and experiences that have shaped my vision and enriched my creativity. Here you'll find an eclectic collection of books, movies, songs, and more, each with its own story and special meaning in my personal and professional journey. This gallery reflects the diverse influences that have contributed to my growth, offering a window into the sources of my inspiration. Enjoy exploring and discovering the various elements that fuel my creativity.

guardia.heroDescription: If one day you can't press the button, your emergency contact will receive an automatic alert. It's that simple.
guardia.problemHeading: What happens if one day you can't call?
guardia.problem1Text: You live alone and nobody would know if something happened.
guardia.problem2Text: Home accidents are more common than you think.
guardia.problem3Text: Your loved ones deserve peace of mind.
guardia.step1Description: Confirm you're okay in seconds. Just one tap.
guardia.step2Description: If you don't check in within 3 days, it acts automatically.
guardia.step3Description: By email and WhatsApp, without you doing anything.
guardia.feature1Description: Designed to be easy to use at any age.
guardia.feature2Description: Keep track of your consecutive days.
guardia.feature3Description: Email and WhatsApp without complex setup.
guardia.emotionalQuote2: It's about knowing that no matter what,
guardia.ctaDescription: One minute to set up. A lifetime of peace of mind.
guardia.ctaFooter: Made with 💚 for those who live alone
